nodes.label: Splash Icon Image
nodes.description: Splash screen icon asset displayed during Nourah app launch. Shows a placeholder/default Expo-style design with concentric circles centered on a light grid background — appears to be the default Expo splash icon rather than a custom Nourah-branded asset. Dimensions roughly 1024x1024, light gray on white.

nodes.label: Splash Screen Brand Imprint
nodes.description: First brand impression delivered to users when launching the Nourah app. Currently uses default placeholder geometry (concentric circles on a grid) rather than custom Nourah branding — indicates the splash visual identity has not yet been finalized.
